socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a warcry, taunting nearby enemies to attack the user and exerting subsequent attacks. The user and nearby allies gain a buff that grants a portion of their physical damage as extra fire damage. In addition to being taunted, enemies are inflicted with a secondary debuff causing them to explode when they die, dealing fire damage in an area.
